productName: Sky High Rosin OG Kush x Headband - 1g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: OG Kush x Headband coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. A premium solventless experience, with notes of woody, pine, and earthy, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
